sourceTitle: 2025 US Halloween participation and party activity

metric.name: consumer survey participation
metric.interpretation: 2025 stated Halloween plans among 8,045 US adults

summary: 万圣节派对和装扮可作为穿戴甲的使用场景假设。
limitations: 2025 年节前意向调查，不是 2026 预测
未涉及穿戴甲，不能推断品类销量

sourceTitle: Halloween discovery channels and early-shopping timing

metric.name: shopping timing and discovery
metric.value: 49% shop by September; 37% online search inspiration
metric.interpretation: supports testing an August–September discovery window

summary: 支持把 2026 Q4 万圣节商品的测试窗口前移，并准备可搜索的 Listing 假设。
limitations: 全体万圣节消费行为，不代表 Amazon US
不代表穿戴甲特定行为或销量

metric.name: platform trend classification
metric.interpretation: a direction derived from platform searches and visual engagement

summary: 为 2026 日常哥特提供暗黑浪漫的审美信号，而非只做节庆恐怖。
limitations: 公开材料未给美国穿戴甲独立样本
平台预测不能等同需求、销量或 Amazon 表现

metric.name: adjacent-category search change
metric.interpretation: adjacent evidence that gothic aesthetics can extend into Q4

summary: Gothmas 信号支持把黑蕾丝、银色、暗调烛光等日常哥特语言延展到冬季。
limitations: Etsy 与 Amazon 用户和类目结构不同

sourceTitle: Etsy Early 2024 gothic clothing search growth

metric.name: gothic clothing search change
metric.interpretation: older background signal for gothic style beyond Halloween

summary: 哥特可作为个人风格背景，而不只是一日节庆装扮。
limitations: 服装而非美甲，地理口径也不够细

publisher: Museum at the Fashion Institute of Technology

metric.name: curatorial cultural evidence
metric.interpretation: historical evidence for gothic fashion as a developed visual language

summary: 哥特时尚横跨亚文化、街头与高级时装，可提炼暗黑浪漫、废墟感与 memento mori 视觉语法。
limitations: 2008–2009 历史展览，不是当前购买数据
死亡意象不能自动套用于亡灵节

sourceTitle: 5 facts about Día de los Muertos

metric.name: institutional cultural guidance
metric.value: November 1–2; remembrance of departed loved ones
metric.interpretation: Día de los Muertos is not Halloween and skull imagery is not simply morbid

summary: 亡灵节应围绕纪念、家庭与生命循环，不得被简化为恐怖或万圣节装饰。
limitations: 文化解释而非市场规模数据
符号含义因家庭、地区和社群而异

sourceTitle: Día de los Muertos in the United States

metric.name: institutional historical evidence
metric.interpretation: calavera imagery carries remembrance, satire and identity contexts

summary: Calavera 与 La Catrina 不只是漂亮骷髅，也关联纪念、社会讽刺与身份建构。
limitations: 历史来源不证明商品需求
不能概括为所有拉丁裔社群的统一观点
